findings.title: Soliton FileZen OS Command Injection — CISA KEV
findings.summary: Authenticated OS command injection in Soliton FileZen via antivirus check feature; added to CISA KEV on Feb 24 confirming active exploitation.

findings.title: Reynolds Ransomware with Embedded BYOVD EDR Killer
findings.summary: New ransomware strain embeds BYOVD component directly in binary to disable EDR at kernel level before encrypting; active campaigns observed.

findings.title: Andariel (DPRK) Deploys Three New RATs: StarshellRAT, JelusRAT, GopherRAT
findings.affected_technology: European public/legal sector, South Korean ERP
findings.summary: WithSecure attributes breach of European public sector org to DPRK Andariel with three new RATs; accessed anti-money laundering documents.

findings.title: Diesel Vortex Phishing Campaign Targets US/EU Freight & Logistics
findings.summary: Financially motivated group using 52 lookalike domains targeting logistics platforms for credential theft enabling supply chain fraud.

findings.title: SSHStalker Botnet — IRC C2 Targeting Linux via Legacy Kernel Exploits
findings.summary: New botnet using IRC C2 to evade modern detection, propagating via legacy kernel exploits and SSH brute-force for DDoS and cryptomining.

findings.title: Red Hat 389-ds-base Heap Buffer Overflow
findings.summary: Heap buffer overflow in schema_attr_enum_callback allows remote DoS or potential RCE via large alias processing.

noted.summary: Firmware backdoor infecting Android tablets via signed OTA updates; survives factory reset.
CaaS platform enabling persistent malicious Google Ads with cloaking and researcher fingerprinting.
12.4M records published by ShinyHunters from US digital auto platform.
Employee data breach by ShinyHunters; SSNs and financial data exposed.
New guidance for securing AI model-serving infrastructure published.
